interface: coordination.k8s.io/v1 (stable); researched against v1.36 documentation and the official OpenAPI specification

auth.redirect_rule: the bearer token must never be sent to a different origin; any 3xx from the API server surfaces as ApiError(reason=Redirect) instead of being followed

create.body: complete Lease: apiVersion coordination.k8s.io/v1, kind Lease, metadata.name (+ namespace), spec

replace.body: complete Lease whose metadata.resourceVersion equals the version read by the preceding GET

conflict.rule: a stale metadata.resourceVersion is rejected; recovery is a fresh GET followed by one retried PUT

lease_spec_fields.holderIdentity: string identity of the current holder
lease_spec_fields.leaseDurationSeconds: int; candidates must wait this long past renewTime before force-acquiring
lease_spec_fields.acquireTime: MicroTime the current holder acquired the lease
lease_spec_fields.renewTime: MicroTime of the holder's last renewal

micro_time.format: RFC3339 UTC with exactly six fractional digits and a trailing Z (microsecond precision), e.g. 2026-07-16T09:15:00.250000Z

renewer_policy.expiry: a foreign lease is expired when now >= renewTime + leaseDurationSeconds, using the lease's own duration
renewer_policy.fresh_lease: creating a lease sets acquireTime == renewTime == now and leaseTransitions 0
renewer_policy.takeover: taking over an expired lease increments leaseTransitions and resets acquireTime and renewTime to now, echoing the GET's resourceVersion
renewer_policy.reclaim: re-acquiring a lease we already hold preserves acquireTime and leaseTransitions and only advances renewTime
renewer_policy.renewal: renewal preserves acquireTime and leaseTransitions and advances renewTime to the injected clock's now
renewer_policy.acquire_conflict: a 409 while taking over means another candidate won: report not-leader, no retry
renewer_policy.renew_conflict: a 409 on renewal is retried exactly once through a fresh GET; if the fresh lease names another holder raise LeadershipLost; a second 409 propagates as ApiError
renewer_policy.lost_leadership: if a fresh GET shows another holderIdentity, raise LeadershipLost without attempting a PUT
